docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE CONTINUED TO BE JOINED WITH CASE# 21-864434
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED) SERVED AUG-11-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MELVILLE, DAVID
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF OFFOMAH, UCHENNA
ORDER DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. NO FURTHER ACTION TAKEN BY THE COURT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF OFFOMAH, UCHENNA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY OFFOMAH, UCHENNA AS TO DEFENDANT MELVILLE, DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-04-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-04-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO OCT-04-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES APPEARED FOR CASE CSM-21-864434 ON AUG-11-2021 THIS CASE IS MOVED TO 1:30PM TO BE HEARD TOGETHER.
REMARK: EXHIBITS RECD BY MAIL SUBMITTED BY PLANTIFF

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF UCHENNA OFFOMAH IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT DAVID MELVILLE IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. MATTER IS HEARD WITH RELATED CASE CSM-21-864434 AND A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT WAS REACHED. MATTER IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN THE RELATED MATTER. DEFENDANTS MAILING ADDRESS IS UPDATED PURSUANT TO DEFENDANTS REQUEST IN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**
EXHIBITS DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON NOVEMBER 8, 2024 PURSUANT TO SECTION 1952 OF THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE OF CALIFORNIA.
